title: Uloma telfairiae

This family is further divided into several subfamilies, one of which is the Hispinae subfamily. Uloma telfairiae is specifically assigned to the subfamily Hispinae. The genus Uloma is also a part of the family Chrysomelidae. This classification is based on the beetle's physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other members of the Chrysomelidae family.
